title: 我要寄一个包裹
pinyin: Wǒ yào jì yí ge bāo guǒ
titleTranslation_en: I Want to Send a Package
description_uz: «Men bitta posilka jo'natmoqchiman.» — pochtada mijoz va xodim o'rtasidagi suhbat. Bu dialog posilka jo'natish, ichidagini aytish, tez va sekin yetkazishni taqqoslash va manzil yozishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik, foydali so'zlar bilan — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Я хочу отправить посылку.» — разговор клиента и сотрудника на почте. Диалог тренирует, как отправить посылку, сказать, что внутри, сравнить быструю и медленную доставку и написать адрес. Близкая тема и полезная лексика — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «I'd like to send a package.» — a chat between a customer and a clerk at the post office. This dialogue practices sending a package, saying what's inside, comparing fast and slow shipping, and writing the address. Relatable topic with useful vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, wǒ yào jì yí ge bāo guǒ.
sentences.text_translation_en: Hello, I'd like to send a package.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Shì yī fu hé huà zhuāng pǐn.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Nín yào jì kuài de hái shì màn de?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вы хотите отправить быстро или медленно?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you want fast or slow shipping?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: How much is the fast one?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Kuài de sān shí kuài, liǎng tiān dào.
sentences.text_translation: Tezi o'ttiz yuan, ikki kunda yetib boradi.
sentences.text_translation_en: The fast one is thirty yuan, arrives in two days.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Màn de shí wǔ kuài, qī tiān dào.
sentences.text_translation: Sekini o'n besh yuan, yetti kunda yetib boradi.
sentences.text_translation_en: The slow one is fifteen yuan, arrives in seven days.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, qǐng xiě yí xià dì zhǐ.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, please write down the address.
sentences.speaker: B
